% Web-only customizations for the Lean Blueprint output.
%
% NOTE: the descriptions below feed leanblueprint's auto-generated
% legend (each becomes "<color> border" / "<color> background"), so
% they should be plain color names — anything longer reads
% ungrammatically once it's suffixed with "border".  The actual legend
% is then *replaced* in post-processing by inject-depgraph-extras.py
% with a tighter, project-specific version (and a red-border highlight
% for major classical-analysis-input umbrellas).

\graphcolor{not_ready}{#FFAA33}{Orange}
\graphcolor{proved}{#9CEC8B}{Light green}
\graphcolor{can_prove}{#A3D6FF}{Light blue}
